stemHtml: An aircraft with the registration H-APPG contacted ATC using the call sign “BLUE PAPA GOLF.” Was this abbreviation correct?

options.a: Yes, if the company call sign is BLUE.
options.b: No, the abbreviation should only include the first letter of the registration mark and the last two letters (H-PG).
options.c: Yes, the abbreviation is correct as long as it follows IATA conventions.
options.d: No, abbreviations are not allowed for registration marks.
